reviews.review_description:
I mean honestly, where are all of the issues with the game people are talking about? Yeah it has some minor bugs which don’t really spoil the fun because yeah, they’re minor. Sure it doesn’t have the „we all know” combat system, but I personally think it’s still very fun and unique.
And honestly the story is just very engaging and the world very immersive. Currently for the price of 2.50$ with the code that you can find on their discord and socials, this game is a HUGE steal.
Don’t listen to overly negative people who just can’t understand that there are different ways of making the games, and when something is unique compared to other  titles is imidiately bad for them. Grab this game till you can, it’s worth it!

I love the warhammer games.  This   is  not worth  18 pounds.  This game as not enough enemies  .the devs have left this game unfinished  . After playing battle sisters  for 10 pounds  .and a bloody good 👍 game  .this game as been abandoned  by devs  .and still getting 18 pounds for the game  .thay should take the game of meta

Snagged this with the 90% code and knowing what I know now, I would have been fine paying $25 for this. The game is nothing mind blowing and the combat can be hit and miss but it's not a very difficult game and most importantly, it's fun! It has a great vibe and voice acting. Carbon Studios is reliable when it comes to art design, exploration, and voice acting. They could definitely improve their combat mechanics but I enjoy all of their games I've played. Really glad I bought a Q3s before this game went unlisted, it's a total gem as far as I'm concerned.

reviews.review_title: The franchise needs a new boss
reviews.review_description: I desperately want to like every Warhammer game but sadly none are worth the time. It’s a shame because the Warhammer art style is some of the best.

I find the game quite decent if you don't care much about graphics and fighting mechanics (some 2000 nostalgia). I'd say that it could be worth 1/3 of the original price but now that it is discounted, don't hesitate. The narrative is nice and the magic is satisfying. Collectibles are literally everywhere and there is no puzzles so it is not very challenging. 
One thing I wish they change: assign more buttons (shortcuts) and the doors closing behind when exploring. Sometimes, you just have to go all around because the shortcut door closes when you pass through.

The
 game has good and bad points.
The game is currently 90% off as it's leaving the store. This won't however effect you if you own it( you will still be able to play it).
It's worth the price for the first 20 mins alone.
Yes, it gets repetitive. Yes, movement and weapon usage can be frustrating at times.
But when you get used to it it's really good fun.
Enjoyed the story and gameplay a lot.
For the price is a no brainer.
Disappointed, it's leaving the store as would've loved follow-up content and games.

reviews.review_title: I wish I could give 3.5 stars
reviews.review_description: I’m a big fan of dungeon crawlers. This isn’t a bad game but it’s underwhelming. I feel like they could’ve done more in every area from the gameplay to the story. I stopped playing it eventually because it just wasn’t capturing my attention or interest like other dungeon crawlers would. I hope they make another game and a better game looking forward to their next project it has to be better. ￼￼

I finally finished this game , and its good , i actually enjoyed it. Maybe some aspects of game are clunky, but art design , level structure , atmosphere , music and sound , its all well done, combat is fun to .

reviews.review_title: Hatte Spass, und das zählt für mich
reviews.review_description:
I'm not familiar with the Warhammer universe, but I still like the vibe and style of the franchise and am happy to be able to experience it in VR. 
+ Points:
Music, voices, sound 
+ Optionally read lots of books about the lore. Maybe in my next playthrough.
+ Game was on sale for 1.99 euros. Definitely worth more.
+ For me, it has a high replay value because of the different difficulty levels
- Points:
Graphics are very outdated
- I would have liked more of the typical appearance of the houses (slanted walls, blue roofs, for example)
- the hit feedback could be better

All in all, I'm glad that the 3.6 ratings didn't stop me from buying it.

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description: Dark and gloomy, just the way I like it! The game is long and quite deep, so if you are a fan of the universe, you are in for an awesome time!

war hammer

Im tired of this practice in the game industry where they release broken glitchy games and decide to just add patches along the way over several months! We are paying customers and NOT your game testers. We are paying you for a finished product. People that are buying your game on release day and who are SUPPORTING YOU, are the ones getting screwed out of an awesome experience. The whole game industry is guilty of doing this and Im tired of it! Of course games arent going to be 100% bug free but come on....NONE of the spells on the weapons work! It glitch on the 1st tutorial and I had to restart it. The animations of the enemies crawled to like 3 frames per second. I upgraded my weapon and text kept going across my screen saying "weapon upgraded" over and over and over and over again and sounds looping over and over as the text kept popping up. I cant allow you to keep my money and have to request a refund. FIX YOUR DAM GAMES!!!

developer_response.body:
Hello, Moibuspm!

We are sorry to hear the game did not live up to your expectations. The issues you described will be thoroughly investigated by our QA team - you're the first player to report problems with spells, low-fps opponents, and floating text, so we will definitely test them again. We want to thank you for your feedback and we hope you will give Tempestfall a second chance in the future. Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
Check out my video review here: https://youtu.be/EZ7ivZiFbO4

Or just search for the YouTube channel “VR Reviews”.

This is my impression after playing about 4 hours of the game. The game is said to take about 8-10 hours to complete.  

You play a 9 foot superhuman warrior called a Stormcast. Your quest is to investigate a massive explosion of dark magic that has triggered the Nighthaunt forces to rise up all across the Mortal Realms.

I am going to spend most of my time talking about combat because that’s really where the core gameplay is. So the combat is good, but it’s certainly not the best combat experience I’ve had. There’s some good strategy and timing elements as you need to parry at the right times and choose the best combination of weapons/magic for each encounter. You can also pull off some cool moves like tearing off skeleton heads and throwing the bodies at their comrades.

Combat can get a bit repetitive though, especially at the beginning of the game when there isn’t much variety of enemies (the variety and difficulty of enemies does increase as the game progresses). Sometimes the gestures used to trigger magic attacks don’t work and I found some collision detection issues too. Also, the AI can be a little stupid at times and whilst the wheel based weapon selection is fine, it can be a bit clunky, especially when in combat. But as I say, combat is still good, but it is let down by these things.

As for everything else, it has nice visuals that nail the Warhammer feel, an engaging story, a lot of movement and comfort options, and plenty of content which includes an arena fighting mode called storm trials. Storm trials is a fun addition that sees you fighting waves of nighthaunt of increasing difficulty. With each wave you complete you chose a reward that helps you progress. 

Overall, I think it’s a great game if you can overlook some of the flaws with the combat. For Sigmar!

Pretty laggy at times and I hate how raising your hand up for the lightning bolt never works. Graphics are good but now I’m seeing that other people are complaining about spells not working. DONT BUY unless you want to use a sword all of the time!

developer_response.body:
Hello, Hollisbaby!

We are sorry to hear you find the spellcasting system unintuitive and difficult. This is an element that, through player feedback, has attracted our attention and we will do what we can to fix it as soon as possible. Thank you for your review - we hope that you will give Tempestfall a second chance in the future and that you will have a good time playing our game. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: More Warhammer

So whether or not the story is your style it is a good one regardless. the only real complaint I have is the fighting is super unsatisfying.  What I mean is, In the walking dead for example when you use the katana blade or any other blade and chop a zombie's head off you get the satisfying feel of really making impact when you hit. In this game You're sort of just flailing weapons around And unless you're casting a spell it sort of feels like you're Just playing the drums on your enemy's head trying to get a hit Especially when wielding dual weapons lol  And while on the subject of weapons I felt that the 3 weapons you carry are able to be fully upgraded WAAAAYYYY too fast.  That's one of the things I love about games like this is working to upgrade your weapons to make them better and better but the working for it part is half the fun don't just give it to me. but like I said it's a pretty good story graphics are super decent just the fighting game play kinda put me off. I gave this game 3 stars but for the price tag I 10/10 would recommend giving this game a shot.

I like the game im at the glitterish marsh. Been playing about 7 hours The story and lore is great and the mechanics to open the chest of enjoyable but the amount of times the upward thrust spells have failed is getting silly now its frustrating, repeatingly thrusting up and it not casting , especially when your trying to add clear, its almost like russian roulete and recently the forward thrust spells have been not casting realiably. If all this was sorted i would easliy give this an extra or maybe 2 stars.  The enemies do change eventually. And the atmosphere is great too. But please polish the spell mechanics. 

EDIT.  The spells have been fixed with the recent update i have finished my first run, i would highly recommend you play this game now its 5 stars from me.
